module_map.responsibility: File metadata extraction and type wrappers for all file attributes
CLI argument parsing and configuration merging from CLI, config files, and environment
submodules: blocks.rs (column selection: permission, user, size, date, name, etc.)

module_map.responsibility: Format and render metadata into grid/tree output with colors and icons
Color mapping from semantic elements to terminal colors
Theme loading from config files and environment

data_flow.description: Calls path.symlink_metadata() and submodules (Owner, Permissions, FileType, Name, Size, Date, INode, Links, AccessControl, SymLink, Indicator). Each submodule extracts one attribute from fs::Metadata. Returns fully populated Meta struct.
Calls Meta::from_path for each path in parallel (rayon). Then calls git::update_git_cache to populate Meta.git_status field. Returns Vec<Meta>.
Reads Flags.sorting (SortColumn, SortOrder) and applies comparators from sort.rs module. Metas vector is sorted in-place.

data_flow.key_function: display::grid/tree(metas: &[Meta], flags: &Flags, colors: &Colors, icons: &Icons, git_theme: &GitTheme) -> String
data_flow.description: Iterates Meta items. For each block in Flags.blocks (Block enum: Permission, User, Size, Date, Name, GitStatus, etc.), calls Meta field's render() method. render() methods use Colors (to colorize) and Icons (for icons). Assembles grid/tree structure with padding/alignment from get_padding_rules().
Takes semantic element label (Elem::Permission, Elem::User, etc.) and applies terminal color codes. Colors are loaded from theme.
Maps file names/extensions to icon characters. Called by Name::render() and display layout logic.

cross_module_hubs.reason: Central aggregator of all file attributes. Every file attribute submodule (size, date, owner, permissions, etc.) is private and accessed only through Meta. Core, display, and sort all read from Meta.

Rendering hub. Depends on Meta fields (via render methods), Flags (block selection/options), Colors (colorization), Icons (icon lookup), GitTheme (git symbols). Called from core.rs and tested directly. Routes each Meta to all display modules.

Configuration hub. Core uses it for sort/display options. Display uses it for block selection/padding. Meta uses permission_flag param at construction. Color/icon themes use it for theme selection. All 20+ submodules are organized under flags/ namespace.

change_proposal.objective: Add a file checksum display column (SHA-256) to lsd output
files_to_modify: src/color.rs (Elem enum + color mapping for checksum)
src/theme/color.rs (add checksum color to theme defaults)
new_types: Checksum struct: contains computed SHA-256 hash as String, derives Display/Debug
change_proposal.pattern_to_follow: Follow the Size/Date pattern: (1) Create new struct in meta/checksum.rs with From<&fs::Metadata> or From<&Path>. (2) Add impl Display. (3) Add render(colors, flags) -> String method. (4) Add to Meta struct as Option<Checksum> field (None for broken symlinks). (5) Initialize in Meta::from_path when not broken_link. (6) Add Block::Checksum variant. (7) Add Block::Checksum case in display.rs::get_output match statement, similar to Size block (lines 382-396). (8) Add Elem::Checksum color to Colors mapping.
change_proposal.integration_point: Meta::from_path calls new Checksum::compute(path) which spawns SHA-256 hash computation. Lazy computation optional: store hash in Meta only if Block::Checksum is in Flags.blocks. Display integration: add one match arm in get_output(). Block selection: add to Blocks struct default or CLI/config flag.
performance_considerations: SHA-256 is blocking I/O; compute only if Block::Checksum is enabled in flags.
Use std::fs::File + sha2 crate for hashing, or defer to separate lazy thread pool.
Cache hashes in memory for recursive listing (Meta already supports recursion).
risks: Performance: SHA-256 on large files or many files will slow output. Mitigation: lazy flag (--checksum or similar) to opt-in.
Consistency with render chain: must add Elem::Checksum color mapping or will panic in colorize(). Test with all color themes.
Alignment/padding: get_padding_rules() computes column widths based on rendered widths. SHA-256 strings are always 64 hex chars, so padding rules should account for this.
Breaking changes: adding optional field to Meta or Block enum is non-breaking if Option<Checksum>. If adding to default Block list, changes default column layout.
Theme compatibility: existing themes won't have Checksum color defined. Use sensible default (e.g., Elem::SizeValue style or generic Elem::FileName).

tool_usage.result: File tree with LOC, function/class counts. Identified 50+ files, key modules (meta/, flags/, display.rs, core.rs).
Meta struct fields (12 subfields), from_path function signature, 9 methods including recurse_into. Imports 34 modules.
Core struct fields (Flags, Icons, Colors, GitTheme, Vec<SortFn>), 5 methods (new, run, fetch, sort, display), imports 24 modules.
25 functions including grid/tree public entry points, get_output (Block rendering), inner_display_grid/tree, get_padding_rules. Imports 39 modules.
Blocks struct (Vec<Block>), Block enum with 13+ variants (Permission, User, Size, Date, Name, GitStatus), methods configure_from, from_cli, from_config, get_header, Block::try_from.
Located Meta::from_path (lines 261-367) and Theme::from_path. Identified metadata collection entry point.
Inspected from_path implementation: calls Owner, Permissions, FileType, Name, Size, Date, INode, Links, AccessControl submodules.
Flags struct with 20 submodules, Configurable trait, configure_from pattern.
get_output function: iterates flags.blocks, matches each Block variant to Meta field render() call, uses colors/icons for colorization.
Listed all 18 meta submodule types (Meta, Name, Size, Date, Permissions, Owner, FileType, etc.) and their enum/struct definitions.
